name: notebook-md
description: WYSIWYG Markdown notebook editor — bring your own cloud storage via OneDrive, Google Drive, or GitHub.

scripts.build: npm -w packages/shared run build && npm -w apps/web run build && npm -w apps/api run build && npm -w apps/collab run build
scripts.lint: npm -w packages/shared run lint && npm -w apps/web run lint && npm -w apps/api run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm -w packages/shared run typecheck && npm -w apps/web run typecheck && npm -w apps/api run typecheck
